commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=cdb3b3c8c64ca7ba744e06585474e5cf3f093360)
commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces both hardcoded Anthropic Claude CLI user-agent version constants with a shared module-load resolver that reads `@anthropic-ai/claude-code/package.json` and adds resolver tests.

PR surface: Source +68, Tests +60. Total +128 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the stale-header path by source inspection: current main and `v2026.6.8` still send `claude-cli/2.1.75` in both Anthropic OAuth builders. The external Anthropic rejection was not live-rerun because it requires credentialed OAuth access.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for concrete resolver/test fixes and real patched-runtime proof; a repair job should not be queued while proof is missing on this external PR.

target.title: fix(anthropic): read claudeCodeVersion at runtime to prevent stale user-agent bearer auth failures
target.author: spric76

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
